{{Infobox character
| name = Rune Queen
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Rune Queen
| abilities = manipulations of her ancient script, Grand Oath Array
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

''See also: [[Rune Queen Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emala]], known as the Rune [[Queen]], was a deceased [[Monarch]] who perished during the [[Dread War]]. During her lifetime, she utilized a [[Path]] of the Last Oath that incorporated elements such as force and water. She was known for her defensive capabilities in battle, specifically against the [[Wandering Titan]], and she once relocated [[Shatterspine Castle]]. Her legacy includes a complex masterpiece called the [[Grand Oath Array]], which consists of various silver sigils and [[scripts]] that can manipulate reality or slow time. She also left behind [[the Queen]]'s [[Gift]], a divine treasure in the form of a condensed gem that allows others to utilize her political and conceptual authority. Her influence persists through inherited methods of controlling silver runes and various surviving script-formations.}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Rune [[Queen]] possessed a powerful [[madra]] that could be consumed and vented, though it clashed with [[Ziel]]'s own energy. Her influence was marked by the provision of silver runes and a script containing a [[dragon]] [[Remnant]]. After moving [[Shatterspine Castle]], she eventually left the stronghold and died shortly thereafter.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Rune Queen]] left the castle and died soon after.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Rune Queen]] is dead.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Rune Queen]] moved [[Shatterspine Castle]] and is now dead.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Rune Queen]] possesses a powerful [[madra]] that clashes with [[Ziel]]'s.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Rune Queen]] has a script containing a [[dragon]] [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Rune Queen]] possesses [[madra]] that can be consumed and vented.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Rune Queen]] provides silver runes.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] is experimenting with the [[Rune Queen’s array]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Rune Queen]]'s authority can alter reality through manipulations of her ancient script.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Rune Queen]] created the [[Grand Oath Array]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“We cannot come at the bidding of the Rune Queen,” Orthos said. “She’s dead.”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
